items.description: A JSONPatch document as defined by RFC 6902

from.description:
This field is used together with operation "move" and uses JSON Pointer notation.

Learn more [about JSON Pointers](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6901#section-5).

op.description: The operation to be performed. One of "add", "remove", "replace", "move", "copy", or "test".

path.description:
The path to the target path. Uses JSON pointer notation.

Learn more [about JSON Pointers](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6901#section-5).

value.description:
The value to be used within the operations.

Learn more [about JSON Pointers](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6901#section-5).

items.title: jsonPatch
